name: National University of Lesotho
description: The National University of Lesotho is the only national university in Lesotho, offering undergraduate and postgraduate programs across multiple faculties.

name: Lesotho College of Education
description: Lesotho College of Education trains primary and secondary school teachers and offers education diploma programs.

name: Lerotholi Polytechnic Institute
description: Lerotholi Polytechnic Institute is Lesotho's leading technical and vocational institution, offering practical engineering, architecture, and business programs.
faculties: Faculty of Architecture and Built Environment

name: Limkokwing University of Creative Technology
description: Limkokwing offers creative, design, communication, and technology programs in a globally connected environment.
faculties: Faculty of Communication Media and Broadcasting
Faculty of Information and Communication Technology

name: Botho University
description: Botho University offers business, IT, and health science programs with a strong focus on employability.
